name: China Reform Culture Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: China Reform Culture Holdings Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and marketing of fluoropolymers, fluorocarbons, and fluorine-containing fine chemicals in China. The company's products include polytetrafluoroethylene micropowders, PTFE fine powder resins, PTFE dispersions, PTFE molding powder resins, pelletized free-flow PTFE resins, molding PTFE fine cut granular resins, PTFE presintered resins, and perfluorinated ethylene-propylene copolymers. It also offers fluorinated ethylene propylene dispersions, fluorinated ethylene propylene dispersions and copolymers, polyvinylidene fluoride resins, fluoroelastomers, fluoroelastomer compounds and precompounds, and fluorosilicone elastomers. The company is based in Beijing, China.
